targets.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "health" and r._field == "steps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "steps")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "health" and r._field == "resting_hr")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "resting_hr")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -14d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sleep")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "deep_h" or r._field == "light_h" or r._field == "rem_h" or r._field == "awake_h")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -14d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "health" and r._field == "body_battery")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -2d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "health" and r._field == "calories")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -2d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "health" and r._field == "stress_avg")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -90d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weight" and r._field == "weight_kg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
